# Now, Not Later!

> Making Confident Decisions for Your Next Chapter in Real Estate. A real estate decision guide by Patti Smith, independent broker of Patti Smith Real Estate in Georgetown, California, serving El Dorado County since 1992 (CA DRE #01110483).

## About the book
Two guides in one. Book One (Beyond the Numbers: A Guide to Life-Centered Real Estate Decisions) is for homeowners weighing their next move. Book Two (Breaking Free: A Renter's Guide to Homeownership) is for renters deciding whether to buy. Both help readers make confident, life-centered real estate decisions rather than waiting for a market that never feels perfect.

## Chapters
- The True Cost of Space (When Homes Become Burdens)
- The Mathematics of What Matters (The Rate Obsession Trap)
- The Geography of Connection (The Growing Weight of Distance)
- Timing Life, Not Markets (Two Different Clocks)
- Writing Your Next Chapter (Home as Life's Stage)
- The Rent Trap (Why Every Payment Takes You Backwards)
- The Perfect Timing Myth (Why Renters Never Find the Right Moment)
- The Inflation Squeeze (How Waiting Makes Everything More Expensive)
- The Life You're Not Living (What Renters Sacrifice Beyond Money)
- Breaking Free (Your Action Plan to Move from Renter to Owner)
